UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User account details, goals, weekly plans and configuration settings.

userId.description: Unique identifier representing the authenticated Firebase user

avatar.description: Public URL to the user's avatar image

wellnessStreak.description: The consecutive days of log activity wellness streak

weightTrend.description: Serialized list or direct array of historic weights tracked by the user

currentWeight.description: The current weight target value of the user in kilograms

targetWeight.description: The target weight of the user in kilograms

hydrationGoalMl.description: The user's standard consumption goal in milliliters

mealAlertsEnabled.description: Whether the eating reminders are active

breakfastTime.description: Configured daily reminder time for breakfast

lunchTime.description: Configured daily reminder time for lunch

dinnerTime.description: Configured daily reminder time for dinner

weeklyPlan.description: JSON object holding breakfast, lunch, and dinner plans per day index

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last synchronization update

users/{userId}.description: Secure single-document root mapping user state to their authenticated Firebase ID.
